forgotPassword.subtitle: Password reset will be available here soon

crossTenant.title: Authorize sharing your data
crossTenant.intro: You're accessing the site of <tenant></tenant>, a TimeMob network partner. Read the terms below and, if you agree, authorize sharing your name, email and phone with this agency so they can reach out.
crossTenant.fallbackBody: By continuing, you authorize sharing your name, email and phone with this agency.
crossTenant.success: All set! You can use the site now.

modal.title: Let's talk
modal.subtitle: Tell us what you're looking for. A broker will be in touch shortly.

success.title: We received your interest!

errors.cnpjExists: This CNPJ is already registered in our base.

terms.title: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy

terms.body: This is placeholder content. Definitive terms will be published soon by each partner agency.
terms.placeholder: If you have any questions, contact support.

neighborhoodPicker.title: Pick neighborhood on the map
neighborhoodPicker.description: Tap or drag the marker to the desired point — we detect the neighborhood from the location.
neighborhoodPicker.helper: Tap the map or drag the marker to detect the neighborhood.
neighborhoodPicker.nothingHere: No results at this point. Try a nearby one.
neighborhoodPicker.noNeighborhoodHere: This point returned no neighborhood. Try a nearby point.
neighborhoodPicker.geocodeFailed: Could not reach Google. Please try again.
neighborhoodPicker.cityMismatch: Heads up: the detected neighborhood seems to be outside {city}.

placeholder.title: Coming soon
placeholder.body: This screen will be available soon.

catalog.title: Catalog coming soon
catalog.body: We are curating a hand-picked selection for you.

crmDisabled.title: CRM is not active yet
crmDisabled.body: Your agency's operations panel hasn't been enabled yet. Contacts captured through the site keep being recorded — talk to us to activate the CRM and access everything.

licenseExpired.title: License expired
licenseExpired.body: Access to your agency's panel is blocked because the license isn't active. Your site and the contacts it captures keep working — renew the license to operate again.

error.fetch: Failed to load leads. Please try again.

actions.error: Could not update. Please try again.

profile.subtitle: Your interest profiles saved at this agency.

error.fetch: Failed to load your profile. Please try again.

empty.message: You haven't saved an interest profile yet.

location.hint: Mark on the map the area where you're looking — we'll fill in state, city and neighborhood automatically to refine the search.

consent.authorize: I authorize the agency to contact me.

profile.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

statsPlaceholder.title: Your journey at a glance
statsPlaceholder.description: Soon you will track everything from here.

landing.heroTitle: Find the home that matches your pace.
landing.heroSubtitle: Boutique service for people looking for a property that fits their story. Local curation, flexible scheduling, honest conversation.

about.title: An agency that knows your neighborhood.
about.body: For over a decade we have brokered sales and rentals across the most sought-after parts of the city. We keep a small, carefully tended portfolio — choosing a home should feel calm, not rushed.

howItWorks.title: From the first coffee to the keys in hand.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: We curate options aligned with what you are looking for and send a tailored shortlist — no inbox overload.

schedule.title: Visit
schedule.body: Book viewings on schedules that work for you. A senior broker accompanies every visit.

decide.title: Decide
decide.body: Full support through the proposal, paperwork and closing. Track each step from your dashboard.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.body: Tell us what you are looking for. We reply within one business day.
contact.address: Rua das Acácias, 245 — Jardim Paulista, São Paulo/SP

errors.server: Server error. Try again in a moment.
